mapper.select: SELECT c.board_comment_seq, c.board_seq, c.parent_board_comment_seq, c.writer_member_seq, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(wm.nickname), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(c.writer_name), ''), wm.member_id) AS writer_name, wm.member_id AS writer_member_id, COALESCE( CASE WHEN wm.profile_image_file_seq IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('/api/files/view/', wm.profile_image_file_seq) END, wm.profile_image_url ) AS writer_profile_image_url, CASE WHEN IFNULL(c.report_count, 0) >= #{blindReportThreshold} THEN #{blindCommentMaskedContent} ELSE c.content END AS content, CASE WHEN IFNULL(c.report_count, 0) >= #{blindReportThreshold} THEN NULL ELSE c.emoticon_seq_1 END AS emoticonSeq1, CASE WHEN IFNULL(c.report_count, 0) >= #{blindReportThreshold} THEN NULL ELSE c.emoticon_seq_2 END AS emoticonSeq2, CASE WHEN IFNULL(c.report_count, 0) >= #{blindReportThreshold} THEN NULL ELSE c.emoticon_seq_3 END AS emoticonSeq3, CASE WHEN IFNULL(c.report_count, 0) >= #{blindReportThreshold} THEN NULL ELSE me1.image_url END AS emoticon_image_url_1, CASE WHEN IFNULL(c.report_count, 0) >= #{blindReportThreshold} THEN NULL ELSE me2.image_url END AS emoticon_image_url_2, CASE WHEN IFNULL(c.report_count, 0) >= #{blindReportThreshold} THEN NULL ELSE me3.image_url END AS emoticon_image_url_3, c.like_count, c.dislike_count, c.report_count, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM board_comment r WHERE r.parent_board_comment_seq = c.board_comment_seq AND r.show_yn = 'Y') AS reply_count, (SELECT v.vote_type FROM board_comment_vote v WHERE v.board_comment_seq = c.board_comment_seq AND v.member_seq = #{currentMemberSeq} LIMIT 1) AS my_vote_type, DATE_FORMAT(c.create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS create_dt FROM board_comment c LEFT JOIN member wm ON wm.member_seq = c.writer_member_seq LEFT JOIN member_emoticon me1 ON me1.member_emoticon_seq = c.emoticon_seq_1 AND me1.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN member_emoticon me2 ON me2.member_emoticon_seq = c.emoticon_seq_2 AND me2.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN member_emoticon me3 ON me3.member_emoticon_seq = c.emoticon_seq_3 AND me3.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE c.board_seq = #{boardSeq} AND c.show_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY c.create_dt ASC

SELECT c.board_comment_seq, c.board_seq, c.parent_board_comment_seq, c.writer_member_seq, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(wm.nickname), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(c.writer_name), ''), wm.member_id) AS writer_name, c.content, c.emoticon_seq_1 AS emoticonSeq1, c.emoticon_seq_2 AS emoticonSeq2, c.emoticon_seq_3 AS emoticonSeq3, c.like_count, c.dislike_count, c.report_count, DATE_FORMAT(c.create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS create_dt FROM board_comment c LEFT JOIN member wm ON wm.member_seq = c.writer_member_seq WHERE c.board_comment_seq = #{boardCommentSeq} AND c.show_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_comment ( board_seq, parent_board_comment_seq, writer_member_seq, writer_name, content, emoticon_seq_1, emoticon_seq_2, emoticon_seq_3, like_count, dislike_count, report_count, show_yn, create_dt, create_id, create_ip ) VALUES ( #{boardSeq}, #{parentBoardCommentSeq}, #{writerMemberSeq}, #{writerName}, #{content}, #{emoticonSeq1}, #{emoticonSeq2}, #{emoticonSeq3}, 0, 0, 0, 'Y', NOW(), #{createId}, #{createIp} )
INSERT INTO board_comment_vote (board_comment_seq, member_seq, vote_type) VALUES (#{boardCommentSeq}, #{memberSeq}, #{voteType})
INSERT IGNORE INTO board_comment_report (board_comment_seq, member_seq) VALUES (#{boardCommentSeq}, #{memberSeq})
